summary: Only RED and BLUE should become AMK notification candidates by default. YELLOW stays quiet advisory unless explicitly escalated. GREEN and GOLD do not notify. PURPLE is future-gated. UNKNOWN is dashboard-only unless the project is required for daily status.

signal_meanings.GREEN: Required checks OK; no AMK interrupt.
signal_meanings.YELLOW: Advisory gap or optional missing capsule; quiet on notifications unless repeated/escalated.
signal_meanings.RED: Required gate failed or malformed required project; notify AMK urgently.
signal_meanings.UNKNOWN: Insufficient evidence; dashboard only unless project is required_for_daily_status.

notify_amk_when: overall_signal or project row is RED and required_for_daily_status is true
capsule current_signal is BLUE for human decision
security / privacy / children / deploy / billing / provider / bridge decision surfaced as BLUE or RED
repeated YELLOW over threshold — optional future flag; off by default in AWARE-1
law_note: Awareness ≠ execution. Capsule ≠ entitlement. Indicator ≠ permission. GREEN ≠ deploy. BLUE requires AMK. RED blocks movement. YELLOW is quiet advisory unless escalated.
